title: 5 Insurance Brokers to Watch Amid Industry Headwinds
text: Increased demand for insurance products, given an aging population, baby boomers and millennials, and the adoption of technology should drive insurance brokers like MMC, AON, AJG, WLTW and BRO.

title: Why Should You Stay Invested in Brown and Brown (BRO) Stock
text: Strong performing segments, strategic buyouts to capitalize on growing markets opportunities, sturdy financial standing and effective capital deployment continue to drive Brown & Brown (BRO).
